heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2105 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated out of the contingent fund of the Senate for the expenses of the Commission such amount as may be necessary each fiscal year, to be disbursed by the Secretary of the Senate on vouchers signed by the Executive Secretary of the Commission and approved by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate: , That no payment shall be made from such appropriation as salary.Provided
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 188b–4 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002Section is based on section 5 of Senate Resolution No. 382, Ninetieth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 1, 1968Pub. L. 100–696

Amendments2001— substituted “such amount as may be necessary each fiscal year,” for “the sum of $15,000 each fiscal year,” and “the Executive Secretary of the Commission and approved by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate” for “the Chairman or Vice Chairman of the Commission”.Pub. L. 107–68

Effective Date of 2001 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to fiscal year 2002 and all succeeding fiscal years, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 107–68section 108(c) of Pub. L. 107–68section 2103 of this title
